title: digitaria californica
intro: Digitaria californica, also known as California crabgrass, is a type of grass that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Digitaria californica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and stems in hot water, and it can also be used in salves and topical creams for skin issues.
